chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Crl. Misc. Application No.S-255 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Fresh Case 1.For orders on office objections 2.For orders on MA 2254/24 3.For hearing of main case 04-02-2025 None present for the applicant. ***** None present for the applicant; no intimation is received so far; same was the position on the preceding date of hearing. However, a perusal of record reflects that learned Justice of Peace dismissed the application filed by applicant for registration of FIR against proposed accused on the basis of police reports submitted by concerned SHO and DSP Complaint Redressal Center, Ghotki, who categorically disclosed in their reports that no offence, as alleged by the applicant, has ever taken place and there is on-going dispute between the parties over money transaction. In view of above, this Court finds no grounds to interfere with the impugned order. The rejection of the plea by learned Justice of Peace for registration of the FIR appears to be based on a proper evaluation of the legal and factual position, and there is no miscarriage of justice in the decision. Accordingly, instant Crl. Misc. Application is hereby dismissed in limine along with listed application(s). JUDGE Ahmad
